rationale: Bug hunt on C14 faction boost_weight code: _get_card_factions/_get_faction_boost in merlin_card_system.gd verified clean (null guards, static correctness, weight math). Feature: run_history was defined in save profile but never populated — now appends 9-field 'Complet' entry per creator decision q-20260415-002, trimmed to last 50 per q-20260414-002. Also populates echo_memory (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, choices_log). Added minigames_won/oghams_used run counters + wiring.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C15 (store_run.gd run_history + echo_memory code). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011, creator chose A: extend GFC to orchestrate forest3D + HubAntre) or end-run screen displaying run_history data.
